title: Love your protocol first before you turn to data
author: Bernard, Rene
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Our data can be super-FAIR but without a protocol, detailing the steps how they were generated, they will remain irreproducible. In a time of methodological shortcuts and insufficient, often misunderstanding M&M description. This presentation will show you what you need in a good methods protocol, that speaks for itself, that is shareable with a DOI, and that you can always keep up-to-date in a suitable protocol repository. This presentation was part of #LOVEDATAWEEK23 supported by the QUEST Center of the BIH and the NeuroCure Cluster of Excellence
